summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky shares logistics for two upcoming reader dinners. The Montréal dinner is scheduled at Marché Mövenpick on January 15th, 2004, and the Berkeley dinner at Au Coquelet Cafe on January 30th, 2004. The post is purely logistical with no substantive commentary or argument.
key_points: Joel organized in-person reader meetup dinners in multiple cities
The dinners reflect the strong community Joel built around his blog
key_insight: This is a logistical announcement with no substantive content to analyze.
